releases.label: DR17
releases.summary: Final SDSS-IV release: complete eBOSS, APOGEE-2 and MaNGA datasets; last release of the legacy (pre-SDSS-V) era.

releases.label: DR16
releases.summary: Fourth SDSS-IV release: final eBOSS large-scale-structure spectra (LRG/ELG/QSO), APOGEE-2 south.

releases.label: DR12
releases.summary: Final SDSS-III release: complete BOSS spectroscopy (~1.5M galaxy spectra), APOGEE-1.

releases.label: DR7
releases.summary: Final SDSS-I/II release: ~930,000 galaxy spectra and ugriz imaging over ~11,663 deg²; basis of the MPA-JHU value-added catalogs.
